articles.title: 'People flew from their seats': Passengers describe how collision unfolded
articles.description: The East of England Ambulance Service says nearly 90 people were injured, over 30 of them seriously.

articles.title: PM under pressure from Labour MPs and ministers to set timetable for exit
articles.description: The BBC has been told that the transport secretary is among those advising Starmer to set out a timetable.

articles.title: Several reported killed in Israeli strikes on Lebanon despite ceasefire
articles.description: The IDF said it struck "Hezbollah targets" after the group fired over 50 projectiles at Israeli forces in southern Lebanon.

articles.title: Cooler Saturday gives brief relief before heat returns
articles.description: After a slightly cooler Saturday, temperatures will rise again, possibly touching 35C by Tuesday with a Met Office amber extreme heat warning set to come into force.
